# PSFTP Notification Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize higher-level PSFTP D2H notification behavior before KMP migration. They pin RFC76 notification reassembly, ordered emission of complete notifications, initial-silence timeout ownership, consumer-owned virtual-clock timeout cleanup, continuation-timeout planning, ignored RFC76 error frames, and the current Android/iOS split for nonzero transport-status packets. `PsFtpRuntimePolicyCommonTest.kt` now executes deterministic shared reassembly, ordering, initial-silence no-emission, fake-clock timeout cleanup, notification error policy split pinning, and continuation-timeout policies without wall-clock waits; production runtime migration still must replace platform protocol waits with injectable timeout integration and choose facade-compatible handling for the nonzero transport-status split before these notification flows move to KMP common code.
